text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Ryan hasn't been feeling well lately, so she
proposes a visit to the shrine.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I assume it's to make a prayer for her condition to
improve. However...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff... Phew...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Okay. That's ten rounds up and down the stairs!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! That's why I'm working up a sweat—to get
back into the swing of things.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Ah... Maybe I've been lacking in discipline?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Well, then. I better do ten more! Gotta make
myself sweat like a waterfall!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Seeing as we've made the trek all the way here, I
suggest we also say a prayer.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Oh, yeah. That makes sense. Let's go make a wish
while we're here!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Ka-ching!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Phew... That should do.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
I pray the fruits of my daily training are seen by
the gods of this shrine!
choice_data_list: I'm certain they're watching over you.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
I pray the fruits of my daily training are seen by
the gods of this shrine!
choice_data_list: I'm certain they're watching over you.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Yeah! I think so too!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Woo! I'm all revved up! I'm gonna go do a couple
more rounds on the stairs!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Here we go, muscles! Don't fail me now!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Whether it's due to her prayers or not, it appears
that Mejiro Ryan is feeling better.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: I hope they are...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
B-but maybe I'm just not training enough! I'll go
run another lap!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Snap!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Oh nooo! Why is this happening?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Sigh... I can't run properly with my shoe untied.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Ryan can't finish training to her
satisfaction and returns home dejected.
